findings.description: The simplified code example omits the `checkLoginId(systemAccount.getLoginId())` call and the `existPermissionUnitId` check with its null guard (`systemAccount.getPermissionUnit() != null && !function.existPermissionUnitId(systemAccount)`). The source shows two distinct business validation patterns: one without a null guard (`existGroupId`) and one with a null guard before the check (`existPermissionUnitId`). The knowledge file only shows the `existGroupId` pattern, so the null-guarded validation pattern is not represented.
PascalCase class names `SystemAccountEntity` and `CM311AC1Component` appear in the source code for s1 but are absent from the s1 hints array.
findings.source_evidence:
SystemAccountEntity systemAccount = form.getSystemAccount();
CM311AC1Component function = new CM311AC1Component();
